name: Dr. Aris Thorne
visualHook: Soft hands, hard watch. Lab coat as costume even in flashback. Smile that says 'consent' while signing harm.
roleInPlot: Backstory antagonist — childhood experiment links to Nadia's shadow curse. May appear in testimony, recording, or present-day probe — not always a fistfight antagonist.
outcome: Emotional victory over ideological: Nadia stays, but Thorne's institution survives her rage — files exist, guilt exists. Survives to Season 2 potential; escape or protected by lawyers in-world.
